instruction: Fix retry_delay(attempt, base_delay) to return the integer exponential delay base_delay * 2 ** (attempt - 1), capped at 60. Accept only non-boolean integers. Raise ValueError when attempt is outside 1 through 8, base_delay is outside 1 through 30, or either input has an unsupported type.
acceptance_criteria: retry_delay returns the correct uncapped exponential delay
retry_delay raises ValueError for booleans and non-integer inputs
retry_delay raises ValueError for attempt or base_delay values outside their ranges

verifiers.name: exponential-values
verifiers.criterion: retry_delay returns the correct uncapped exponential delay

verifiers.name: types
verifiers.criterion: retry_delay raises ValueError for booleans and non-integer inputs

verifiers.name: ranges
verifiers.criterion: retry_delay raises ValueError for attempt or base_delay values outside their ranges
